principle: No route family may perform unbounded live work on the Ghost hot path.

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: inline deterministic evaluation
route_families.recommended_conversion: keep inline

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: direct URL classification and action emission
route_families.recommended_conversion: keep direct URL classification inline

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: local clock read
route_families.recommended_conversion: keep inline

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: cached/deferred by default; live allowed for Deck/detail
route_families.recommended_conversion: keep cached repeat fast and continue slow providers asynchronously

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: saved/cache first; live probe deferred by default
route_families.recommended_conversion: keep saved/current split and reserve live location for detail or background refresh

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: cached/fast baseline by default; detailed battery telemetry on Deck/detail
route_families.recommended_conversion: keep heavy battery report and hardware helper out of Ghost

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: cached monitor snapshot by default; diagnostic work policy-marked async
route_families.can_block: diagnosis can block until fully converted
route_families.recommended_conversion: move diagnostic bursts to explicit continuation worker

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: cached/fast native memory baseline; hardware helper refresh deferred
route_families.recommended_conversion: converted in L6.3C

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: cache first; disk scan deferred by default
route_families.recommended_conversion: converted in L6.3C

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: machine identity inline; deep hardware telemetry cached/deferred
route_families.performs_live_probes: hardware telemetry can, identity does not
route_families.recommended_conversion: keep identity separate from deep hardware telemetry

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: cached helper snapshot or deferred through resource/power callers
route_families.recommended_conversion: promote full telemetry to worker-backed Deck detail

route_families.current_route_handler: workspace tools and orchestrator workspace summary
route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: compact summary/profile-gated; deep restore/list policy async
route_families.can_block: deep restore/search can block if not routed async
route_families.recommended_conversion: return compact summary first; Deck/detail for deep restore

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: compact continuity; recent file scans cached/deferred
route_families.recommended_conversion: converted recent-files hot path; deepen continuity spans later

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: bounded open/read; deep search policy async
route_families.can_block: heavy search can block until fully converted
route_families.recommended_conversion: move recursive/deep file search to continuation worker

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: native app/process lookup and action with adapter contract
route_families.recommended_conversion: add per-action timeout and verification trace

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: native window enumeration/control
route_families.recommended_conversion: add per-action timeout and verification trace

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: native system action with safety contract
route_families.recommended_conversion: keep trust boundaries and add per-action budgets

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: policy async for launch/install/verify style work
route_families.recommended_conversion: keep staged progress and no fake success

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: policy async for repair/recovery
route_families.recommended_conversion: keep recovery async and verification-gated

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: transport action with route policy
route_families.can_block: transport can block until fully worker-backed
route_families.recommended_conversion: move slow transport send to continuation and keep failures stage-specific

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: clarify/provenance-first; no fake pixel capture
route_families.recommended_conversion: keep clipboard/screen provenance explicit

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: typed local approval state
route_families.recommended_conversion: keep inline and auditable

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: direct nonblocking runtime control
route_families.recommended_conversion: keep playback output nonblocking

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: provider only when native route cannot own request
route_families.recommended_conversion: never let provider own native status routes

route_families.current_hot_path_behavior: immediate unsupported or disabled capability result
route_families.recommended_conversion: return truthful unsupported state
